tools.name: render_chart
tools.description: Render and validate a chart config, store it for 10 minutes, and return a public image URL. A fetched image may remain cached for up to 1 hour. Authenticated calls use the account's render allowance.

tools.name: save_chart
tools.description: Save and publish a chart config to permanent public Image and Embed URLs, and return Edit and Studio management URLs. Requires authentication and uses saved-chart storage.

tools.name: validate_chart
tools.description: Check a chart config against the current schema without creating an image. Use when validation itself is requested or while debugging.

tools.name: list_themes
tools.description: List all available chart themes with guidance on where each works best.

tools.name: list_marks
tools.description: List all available mark types with their specific properties and defaults.

tools.name: get_examples
tools.description: Get current, ready-to-use chart configs that demonstrate preferred semantic patterns, including built-in labels. Optionally filter by mark type.
